stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a regulated take-off mass (RTOM) table for runway 23L from take-off position VB. In each RTOM chart box, the following information is provided for a given wind component, and a given outside air temperature: MTOW / limit code / V1/VR/V2 (+100 kt). For this question do NOT interpolate, use the most conservative data at ALL times.

Given the following information, determine the RTOM for departure:

W/V: 230/10 kt
WX: CAVOK
OAT: -3°C
QNH:999 hPa
Engine anti-ice: ON
Packs: OFF
Quick line up
